decisions.title_en: Apple Q2 record: $111.2B revenue, $100B buyback, Cook's last earnings
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Apple posted Q2 record revenue $111.2B (+17%), EPS $2.01, $100B new buyback, iPhone +21.7%, Greater China $20.5B (+28%). Tim Cook's last earnings before Sept 1 Ternus handoff, with memory cost crisis and AI strategy under scrutiny.

decisions.title_en: Musk concludes testimony Day 4, Birchall DAFs probed, 3-day break begins
decisions.reason: Previously published 4-23, 4-25, 4-27, 4-28, 4-29. New info on 4-30: (1) Musk concluded all testimony after Microsoft attorney Russell Cohen recross-examination, (2) Jared Birchall testified about Musk's donor-advised funds at Vanguard/Fidelity, (3) court adjourned for 3-day break — no proceedings until Monday morning, (4) Brockman expected as Monday's lead-off witness. None of this was in prior coverage.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI launches Advanced Account Security with Yubico, free tier included
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. OpenAI launched opt-in AAS for ChatGPT/API on April 30: passkey/security key required, password login disabled, email/SMS recovery removed, model training opt-out. Yubico partnership offers $68 2-pack YubiKeys (down from $126). Targets journalists, dissidents, elected officials.

decisions.title_en: Snapchat launches AI Sponsored Snaps in Chat tab
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Snapchat April 28 announced AI Sponsored Snaps — brands deploy AI agents directly in user inboxes for conversational commerce. CBO Ajit Mohan calls chat 'the most valuable real estate in advertising'. Traditional Sponsored Snaps already drive +22% conversions / -20% CPA; 500M users have messaged the My AI bot since 2023.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic retires 1M context beta for Sonnet 4.5 and Sonnet 4
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. April 30 is the official cutoff: claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929 and claude-sonnet-4-20250514 with the context-1m-2025-08-07 beta header silently fall back to 200K tokens; >200K requests return 400. Migration path is Sonnet 4.6 / Opus 4.6 (1M at standard pricing, no header). Less than 7 weeks from GA to beta retirement.

decisions.title_en: Cognition AI in talks for $25B valuation funding round
decisions.reason: Bloomberg first reported the $25B valuation talks on 2026-04-23, which is 8 days before today (2026-05-01) — exceeds the 5-day freshness limit. No fresh material development since.

Released 2026-04-22, 9 days before today — exceeds 5-day freshness limit.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI revokes macOS app certificate after Axios npm supply-chain attack
decisions.reason: OpenAI's official Axios developer tool compromise blog post was published 2026-04-10; the May 8 deadline is just a forward-looking expiration date. Underlying world-state event (compromise + certificate rotation) is 21 days old — exceeds 5-day freshness limit.
